glosses.vi: được quyết định; được ấn định
glosses.ro: a fi hotărât; a fi stabilit
glosses.ja: 確定している; 決まっている

translations.en: Today the appointment has to be set.
translations.es: Hoy hay que fijar la fecha.
translations.fr: Il faut arrêter la date aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天必须把日期定下来。
translations.nl: Vandaag moeten we de datum prikken.
translations.hu: Ma meg kell állapítani az időpontot.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να οριστεί η ημερομηνία.
translations.nb: I dag må vi spikre datoen.
translations.id: Hari ini kita harus menetapkan tanggalnya.
translations.sv: I dag måste vi spika datumet.
translations.da: I dag skal vi fastlægge datoen.
translations.ja: 今日は日程を決めないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed in the Vorfeld as a frame-setter; modifies the whole clause.
Finite modal auxiliary in V2 position (3rd sg. pres.); carries tense/agreement and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article marking nominative singular (masc.); determiner of the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject NP; agrees with the finite verb via the clause's subject function.
Lexical main verb in bare infinitive form; clause-final complement selected by the modal auxiliary.

translations.en: It should have been decided long ago.
translations.es: Ya debería estar decidido desde hace tiempo.
translations.fr: Ça devrait être décidé depuis longtemps.
translations.it: Avrebbe già dovuto essere deciso da tempo.
translations.yue: 呢件事早就應該敲定咗。
translations.ru: Это давно должно было быть решено.
translations.pt: Isso já deveria ter sido decidido há muito tempo.
translations.vi: Lẽ ra việc này phải được chốt từ lâu.
translations.ar: كان ينبغي أن يُحسم هذا منذ وقت طويل.
translations.nl: Dit had allang beslist moeten zijn.
translations.hu: Már rég meg kellett volna születnie a döntésnek.
translations.hi: यह तो बहुत पहले तय हो जाना चाहिए था.
translations.pl: To powinno było zostać ustalone już dawno.
translations.el: Αυτό θα έπρεπε να έχει αποφασιστεί εδώ και καιρό.
translations.nb: Dette burde vært avgjort for lenge siden.
translations.id: Seharusnya ini sudah diputuskan sejak dulu.
translations.sv: Det här borde ha varit avgjort för länge sedan.
translations.ro: Ar fi trebuit să fie stabilit de mult.
translations.cs: To už mělo být dávno rozhodnuté.
translations.da: Det burde have været afgjort for længst.
translations.fi: Tämä olisi pitänyt päättää aikoja sitten.
translations.ja: これはとっくに決まっていたはずだ。

tokens.explanation: Expletive/dummy subject occupying the preverbal subject position; no concrete referent.
Finite modal auxiliary in V2 (Konjunktiv II/irrealis or past form used as modal 'should'); selects a bare infinitive.
Temporal degree adverb modifying the predicate; indicates the state should already have held for some time.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal auxiliary.

translations.en: The plan will be settled soon.
translations.it: Il piano sarà definito a breve.
translations.pt: O plano será definido em breve.
translations.vi: Kế hoạch sẽ sớm được chốt.
translations.hi: योजना जल्द ही तय हो जाएगी.
translations.ro: Planul va fi stabilit în curând.
translations.ja: 計画はもうすぐ固まる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking nominative singular (masc.); determiner of the subject NP.
Head noun of the subject NP.
Finite auxiliary 'werden' in V2 expressing future; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates near future.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of 'wird' in a future construction.

translations.en: For me, that has to be certain.
translations.es: Para mí eso tiene que estar decidido.
translations.fr: Pour moi, ça doit être décidé.
translations.zh-Hans: 对我来说，这件事必须确定下来。
translations.yue: 對我嚟講，呢件事一定要敲定。
translations.ru: Для меня это должно быть однозначно решено.
translations.pt: Para mim, isso tem que estar decidido.
translations.tr: Benim için bunun net olması gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Với tôi, chuyện đó phải chắc chắn.
translations.ar: بالنسبة لي، يجب أن يكون هذا محسومًا.
translations.uk: Для мене це має бути остаточно вирішено.
translations.hi: मेरे लिए यह बात पक्की होनी चाहिए.
translations.pl: Dla mnie to musi być pewne.
translations.el: Για μένα αυτό πρέπει να είναι οριστικό.
translations.nb: For meg må det være avklart.
translations.sv: För mig måste det vara klart.
translations.ro: Pentru mine, asta trebuie să fie hotărât.
translations.cs: Pro mě to musí být jisté.
translations.da: For mig skal det være afgjort.
translations.ja: 私にとって、それは確実でなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; heads a fronted PP expressing perspective/standard ('for me').
Personal pronoun in accusative; object of the preposition 'für' within the PP.
Finite modal auxiliary in V2; carries tense/agreement and selects a bare infinitive complement.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the clausal subject (no following noun).
Lexical main verb in bare infinitive; clause-final complement of the modal auxiliary.

en: Today the appointment has to be set.
It should have been decided long ago.
The plan will be settled soon.
For me, that has to be certain.
